label: Screen context • Xcode editor beats package-version sidebar
notes: The reported failure: Xcode's snapshot surfaced only the package-dependency version numbers (9.15.0, 0.3.11, …) and never the code. With the direct focused-content read + bare-version-token drop, the block must instead show the Swift the user is viewing and omit the version noise.

rubric: The context shows the user is viewing or editing Swift code in Xcode
It does not present dependency version numbers as the on-screen content
